examples: So the next time you see a robin "head-cocking" you can be fairly sure it's listening and looking for those mouthwatering treats!
Very seductive floral, lime, mineral aromas and flavours. It's elegant and beautifully proportioned, with a long mouthwatering finish.
For lunch, cross the road from Mangaldas Market to Rajdhani for a mouthwatering Rajasthani thali.
When followed by a sugary crepe, it made a mouthwatering meal for well under five dollars.
